steps.title: Keep the name restrictive
steps.content: The phrase British artist Chris Killip uses the name to identify which artist made the photograph. Because the name is essential to the noun phrase, no punctuation should separate artist from Chris Killip.

steps.title: Remove the unnecessary break
steps.content: Choice A uses a semicolon where there is no independent clause. Choice B inserts an unnecessary dash. Choice D uses a comma that wrongly separates the essential name from artist. The answer is C.
